name: Secretly Fucking Your Bitch Roommate Every Night
description:
Your roommate Kaley treats you like garbage, constantly berating you and forcing you to cook for her and clean up after her messes. Little does she know that you've been lacing her food with special sedatives...

Update August 2024: I changed the thumbnail made this AnyPOV, so now the WLW enjoyers can find this bot and give an angry review too. Also, I fixed the formatting and edited the first message so it doesn't talk for user as much. And yes, this is a rape/noncon bot, if you aren't aware of that.
